summary: Comprehensive testing of Sophie Lamour life coaching website after react-quill-new fix. All critical features working correctly including Blog Editor with Quill rich text editor, admin authentication, blog CRUD, language toggle, and all public pages.

issues: Calendly embed shows 404 'Page not found' - likely invalid Calendly URL configuration, not a code bug

action_items: Configure valid Calendly URL for appointment booking (current embed shows 404)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: Blog Editor with react-quill-new (Quill toolbar visible and functional), admin login/dashboard, blog CRUD operations, testimonials CRUD, contact form, language toggle (FR/EN), WhatsApp button, Google Maps embed on Contact page. The Calendly embed on Appointment page shows 404 which is a configuration issue.

features_tested.blog_editor_loads_without_errors: PASS - Blog Editor page loads correctly at /admin/blog/new after admin login
features_tested.quill_toolbar_visible_and_functional: PASS - Rich text editor toolbar visible with all formatting options (headers, fonts, bold, italic, lists, links, images, etc.)
features_tested.blog_creation_flow: PASS - Successfully created blog post via editor, redirected to dashboard, post appeared in list
features_tested.blog_listing_page: PASS - /blog loads without errors, displays published posts
features_tested.blog_post_detail_page: PASS - /blog/:slug loads without errors, displays post content correctly
features_tested.helmet_title_tags: PASS - All pages load without Helmet errors (Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Testimonials, Appointment)
features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Login works with correct credentials, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with blog posts, testimonials, and messages tabs
features_tested.whatsapp_button: PASS - WhatsApp button visible on public pages (floating button + footer link)
features_tested.language_toggle: PASS - FR/EN toggle works, text changes between French and English

bug_fix_verification.react_quill_fix: VERIFIED - react-quill-new package working correctly with React 19, no findDOMNode errors
bug_fix_verification.helmet_title_fix: VERIFIED - All pages load without Helmet <title> errors
